DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
theme token-api token-value token
style
pattern

DSDS Token API Definition

Platform-specific identifiers for a design token. An open map where keys are platform names and values are the identifier strings for that platform. Additional platforms can be added without schema changes.

Source: tokens/token-api.schema.json

tokenApi

Platform-specific identifiers for a token. Keys are platform names (e.g., 'cssCustomProperty', 'scssVariable', 'jsConstant', 'iosToken', 'androidToken', 'designToolVariable') and values are the identifier strings for that platform. Additional platforms can be added without schema changes.

object

Open map: keys are strings, values are string

Example

[
  {
    "cssCustomProperty": "--color-text-primary",
    "scssVariable": "$color-text-primary",
    "lessVariable": "@color-text-primary",
    "jsConstant": "colorTextPrimary",
    "iosToken": "Color.Text.primary",
    "androidToken": "colorTextPrimary",
    "designToolVariable": "color/text/primary",
    "composeToken": "Color.Text.Primary",
    "flutterConstant": "colorTextPrimary",
    "tailwindClass": "text-primary"
  },
  {
    "cssCustomProperty": "--space-4",
    "scssVariable": "$space-4",
    "jsConstant": "space4"
  },
  {
    "cssCustomProperty": "--font-weight-bold",
    "jsConstant": "fontWeightBold",
    "iosToken": "Font.Weight.bold",
    "androidToken": "fontWeightBold",
    "swiftUIFont": "Font.Weight.bold",
    "composeToken": "Typography.Weight.Bold"
  }
]
↑ Back to top
